title: Pirate Economy
description: Pirates prefer luxury goods over money. If they could use money in normal society, they probably wouldn't be pirates. This affects how you pay them, bribe them, and trade with them.
definition-of-done: Pirate payment prefers goods over money. Luxury goods have premium value to pirates. Money-only payments heavily discounted. Pirate trade uses barter-style mechanics.
testing-plan: Verify goods preferred over money. Test luxury good valuation. Verify money discount. Test barter mechanics.
todos: Create luxury good valuation for pirates
